title: Gauge Calculator
hero: Get your gauge right — no math, no mistakes.
description: Accurate gauge means accurate fit. Measure your swatch, enter the numbers, and instantly get your stitch and row gauge in inches or centimeters.
excerpt: Get your gauge right — no math, no mistakes.
whyUseThisTool: Your swatch holds all the answers — this tool simply turns them into clear gauge numbers you can use. It helps you check accuracy, verify tension, and be confident your project will fit your machine and your body.
